zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Burdon於1392年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾霍爾梅 皮朋特時，她的父親Sir John Bourdon VI32歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x47歲。她於1414年與Sir Francis Empson在英國諾薩普頓史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1421年在她的家鄉享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Burdon于1392年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾霍爾梅 皮朋特时，她的父亲Sir John Bourdon VI32岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x47岁。她于1414年与Sir Francis Empson在英国諾薩普頓史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1421年在她的家乡享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Burdon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Polish: nickname for a troublemaker (see   Burda  ).

variants.name: Burden
meanings: (southern England, of Norman origin): from a diminutive of the ancient Germanic personal name Burdo, for which compare Burdett . Burdonus and other derivatives of the Gaulish personal name Burdo (‘mule’) are found in France, where it is rare and the similar French surname may derive instead from Old French bourdon in the sense ‘pilgrim's staff’ (compare Bourdon 1). The personal name, whether of ancient Germanic or Gaulish origin, does occur in medieval England, but rarely.

habitational name from any of various places called Burdon or Burden. Burden in Yorkshire and Great Burdon in County Durham are named with Old English burh ‘stronghold, fortified place’ + dūn ‘hill’; Burdon in Tyne and Wear is named with Old English b̄re ‘byre’ + denu ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Burdon was born in 1392, in Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Sir John Bourdon VI, was 32 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x, was 47. She married Sir Francis Empson in 1414, in Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1421, in her hometown, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Burdon est née en 1392, à Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Bourdon VI, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x, avait 47 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Francis Empson en 1414, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1421, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Burdon 1392 in Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Bourdon VI 32 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x 47. Sie hat 1414 in Northamptonshire, England Sir Francis Empson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1421 im Alter von 29 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Burdon è nata il nel 1392 nel Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Sir John Bourdon VI, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x, aveva 47 anni. Lei sposato Sir Francis Empson nel 1414, nel Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1421, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Burdonが1392年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアホールメ ピエレプオントで生まれた時，父Sir John Bourdon VIは32歳，母Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering xは47歳であった。1414年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアでSir Francis Empsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1421年に故郷で29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Burdon(이)가 1392년 영국 노틴그함실르 홀 피레폰트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Bourdon VI(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 1414년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 Sir Francis Empson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1421년 그녀의 고향에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Burdon родилась в 1392 г. в местности холм пьиррепонт, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Bourdon VI было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x, 47. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Francis Empson в 1414 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1421 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 29 лет.
